recommendations.title: Outside In
recommendations.overview: An ex-con struggling to readjust to life in his small town forms an intense bond with his former high-school teacher.

recommendations.title: Your Sister's Sister
recommendations.overview: Iris invites her friend Jack to stay at her family's island getaway after the death of his brother. At their remote cabin, Jack's drunken encounter with Hannah, Iris' sister, kicks off a revealing stretch of days.

recommendations.title: Laggies
recommendations.overview: Overeducated and underemployed, 28 year old Megan is in the throes of a quarterlife crisis. Squarely into adulthood with no career prospects, no particular motivation to think about her future and no one to relate to, Megan is comfortable lagging a f

recommendations.title: St. Vincent
recommendations.overview: A young boy whose parents just divorced finds an unlikely friend and mentor in the misanthropic, bawdy, hedonistic, war veteran who lives next door.

recommendations.title: We the Poor
recommendations.overview: Carpenter Pepe El Toro lives peacefully with his daughter Chachita in an impoverished Mexico City neighborhood. He pursues a romance with the pretty Celia, but tragedy comes knocking on his door when he is falsely accused of having perpetrated a felo

recommendations.title: The Valet
recommendations.overview: World famous movie star Olivia faces a PR disaster when a paparazzi snaps a photo of her with her married lover, Vincent. The hard-working valet Antonio accidentally appears in the same photo and is enlisted to pose as Olivia’s new boyfriend as a cov

recommendations.title: Vai Que Dá Certo
recommendations.overview: 5 friends have a plan to rob a transporter that can change their lives.

recommendations.title: SLC Punk
recommendations.overview: Two former geeks become 1980s punks, then party and go to concerts while deciding what to do with their lives.

recommendations.title: Plan B
recommendations.overview: After a regrettable first sexual encounter, a straight-laced high school student and her slacker best friend have 24 hours to hunt down a Plan B pill in America's heartland.

recommendations.title: We're the Millers
recommendations.overview: A veteran pot dealer creates a fake family as part of his plan to move a huge shipment of weed into the U.S. from Mexico.
